EXOCORE
You are offline

No internet connection

Exocore needs a connection to your server to run the editor and terminal. Connect to the internet and click Retry, or install Exocore locally on your device.

Run Exocore locally

Download the installer for your platform and run it offline — no internet required after setup.

🐧 Linux Ubuntu · Debian · Arch · Fedora 🤖 Android Termux — runs in your terminal 🍎 iOS / iPadOS iSH shell or SSH to a server 🪟 Windows Double-click installer (.bat) 🐳 Docker docker run exocore
Exocore v4.0.0 · Browser-based IDE
